prompt: Save https://www.apple.com/macos/ as a PDF to ~/Desktop/kinbench/103-page.pdf. Use any tool: cerebellum 'safari print_page_to_pdf https://www.apple.com/macos/ ~/Desktop/kinbench/103-page.pdf' (drives File > Export as PDF), browser_session, or fetch the page content via web_fetch and convert. Eval only checks the PDF file exists and is valid.
